markdownRemark.html:
At Sāvatthī.

“Mendicants, sentient beings come together and converge because of an element: the shameless with the shameless … imprudent … witless …

… shameless … uneducated … witless …

… shameless … lazy … witless …

… shameless … unmindful … witless …”

SN.14.20. Anottappamūlaka Sutta (“Beginning With Imprudence”)
